tests.test_name: Selenium - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner uploading a single Selenium test file receives structured documentation output with all tests named and no missing values.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing a Selenium test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or blank fields exist in the downloaded results
At least one test is extracted from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by a name

tests.test_name: Selenium - PO - Parameterized expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner uploading a data-driven Selenium test file sees each data row expanded into its own separate documented test.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing a data-driven Selenium test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or blank fields exist in the downloaded results
Each data row from the parameterized test is expanded into its own test entry

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test entry is identifiable by a name

tests.test_name: Selenium - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager uploading a single Selenium test file receives documentation that includes a populated test coverage matrix.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing a Selenium test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or blank fields exist in the downloaded results
At least one test is extracted from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by a name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the documented test

tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager uploading a data-driven Selenium test file sees all data rows collapsed into a single test entry whose coverage matrix rows reflect each data example.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing a data-driven Selenium test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or blank fields exist in the downloaded results
All data rows are collapsed into a single documented test rather than expanded individually

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test entry is identifiable by a name

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The number of coverage matrix rows corresponds to the number of data rows in the parameterized test

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for generic
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row conforms to the expected structure for the generic test type
